title: Booger adventures!
description: This mod will add a “booger” to your world. It's fun! With this wonderful mod, baby goats will begin to appear in your world, from which small lumps of boogers fall out!
body: This mod will add a “booger” to your world. It's fun! With this wonderful mod, booger ores will begin to appear in your world, from which small clumps of boogers fall out!
